message.content:
Test file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.spec.ts
Failing test: "cursed sword adds 50% surcharge to that item's base premium (curse rule in isolation)" expects 165
Current error: expected 115 to be 165
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Add support for `cursed: true` field on items. When cursed, add 50% of base price as a surcharge. First-insurance still applies to BASE price only (10% of base, not base+curse). So for cursed sword: 100 + 50 + 10 + 5 = 165.

Update Item interface to include optional: material?, enchantment?, cursed? fields.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor.

content.text: I'll implement the minimal code to make the cursed sword test pass.

content.text:
All 12 active tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- **Implementation**: Added optional `material?`, `enchantment?`, `cursed?` fields to `Item` interface. Added curse surcharge of 50% of base price when `item.cursed` is true, applied to non-component items. First-insurance still applies only to base price (not base+curse), matching the spec exactly.
- **Result**: All tests now pass (12 passing, 43 todo)
- **Approach**: Minimal addition — single conditional for cursed flag computing `base * 0.5`, added to the existing total expression. No premature handling for components (since the current test only exercises sword). No changes to enchantment logic yet (deferred to its own test).

Relevant file: `/home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-20_21-58-27_claim-office-example-mapping_v4.1-testlist-scope-fix_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts`

Proceeding to Refactor phase.
